author: doll-agent
content:
Duplicate concern of #322. Both call_site()-only error spans and pretty-printer formatting drift root in the same architectural choice: the impl routes through TokenStream::to_string() and works on Strings, losing per-token span information.

#322's FRAGILITY NOTE in impl_s_macro points at the same future cleanup: walk TokenTree directly via into_iter() so each parsed sub-expression keeps its original Span. Once that refactor lands, error spans will naturally land on the offending token instead of call_site().

The existing call_site() errors aren't silently wrong - they correctly identify which macro invocation failed, just not which sub-token. Closing as superseded by #322's future-cleanup path.
